nav.errorDesc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.
nav.errorContact: If the problem persists, contact support.

help.title: Help & support
help.contactBody1: Question, bug, or feature request? Reach us at
help.quickStartStep1: Connect your mailbox (Gmail, Zoho or Outlook) from the Inbox tab.
help.quickStartStep2: Configure your signature and tone in Settings.
help.quickStartStep3: Automail analyzes incoming emails and drafts replies. You always keep control to review and send.
help.privacyBody: Our privacy policy is available at

support.heroTitle: Analyze an email and generate a reply in seconds
support.heroLead: Paste the subject and body of a customer email. The copilot extracts identifiers, queries Shopify, checks tracking when relevant, and prepares a careful draft for you to review before sending.
support.subject: Subject
support.bodyPlaceholder: Paste the full customer email here…
support.missingContent: Please provide the email subject or body.
support.noReplyBanner: No draft generated: latest customer message appears to close the loop.
support.draftDisclaimer: Generated by AI from verified Shopify data. Always review before sending.

analysis.noTrackingResolved: Tracking is not refreshed for resolved conversations. Reopen the conversation to refresh.

settings.heroLead: These settings are applied to every draft reply generated by the copilot. Adapt them to your brand, tone, and commercial policy for drafts that are immediately usable.
settings.draftPersonalizationDesc: These settings are applied to every draft reply generated by the support copilot.
settings.signatureNameDetails: Displayed at the bottom of every draft.
settings.toneDetails: How formal the draft should sound.
settings.replyLanguageDetails: Auto = match the customer's language. The entire reply (including closing) will use a single language.
settings.closingPhraseDetails: Leave blank to use the default for the selected tone. Will be translated if it doesn't match the reply language.
settings.greetingStyleDetails: The AI will always use its judgment to avoid using a company name as a person's name, or assuming gender.
settings.shareTrackingDetails: Set to No if you use a dropshipper and don't want tracking details shared with customers.
settings.shareTrackingYes: Yes — include tracking number and link
settings.sendSectionDesc: Choose how the « Send » button behaves in the inbox.
settings.immediateSendDetails: Immediate sends the reply in one click. The safety delay gives you 5 seconds to cancel before it leaves.
settings.refundDesc: Describe your refund and return conditions. The AI uses this when drafting replies to refund or return requests. Be specific: eligible window, conditions, process, exclusions.
settings.refundPolicyPlaceholder: e.g. We offer a 30-day return window for unused items in original packaging. Refunds are processed within 5 business days of receiving the return. Items on sale are final sale.
settings.settingsError: Settings could not be saved. Please try again.
settings.uiLanguageDetails: Changes the language of the app immediately. Saved per user.

dashboard.heroLead: Track emails received, conversations qualified as support, AI draft adoption, and the current state of your inbox — as of {{date}}.
dashboard.chartSubtitle: Emails received · Drafts generated and sent
dashboard.qualitySubtitle: Support volume + median response time per day
dashboard.heatmapSubtitle: Support emails received by day × hour
dashboard.topIntentsSubtitle: By conversation count · median response time
dashboard.reopenedSubtitle: Quality signal: resolved then reopened in period

inbox.connectDesc: Automatically scan your inbox for customer support emails, classify them, and generate draft replies.

mailboxLimit.title: Cannot connect a mailbox
mailboxLimit.trialExpired: Your trial has ended. Upgrade to a paid plan to connect a mailbox.
mailboxLimit.quotaReached: Limit reached: {{used}} / {{limit}} mailboxes connected. Upgrade to add more.

inbox.resyncConfirm: This will delete all ingested emails for this shop and re-fetch them from your mailbox. Drafts you've already started are preserved. Continue?
inbox.noEmailsMatch: No emails match the current filters.
inbox.disconnected: Email disconnected. Refresh the page to reconnect.
inbox.toAnalyzeHint_one: {{count}} support conversation classified but not analyzed. Click "Analyze" to run the full analysis (uses 1 conversation from your quota). Removed conversations move to the "Other" tab.
inbox.toAnalyzeHint_other: {{count}} support conversations classified but not analyzed. Click "Analyze" on a conversation to run the full analysis (uses 1 conversation each). Removed conversations move to the "Other" tab.
inbox.clearAnalyzeQueueConfirm_one: Move {{count}} conversation to the "Other" tab? A new customer message will automatically bring it back here.
inbox.clearAnalyzeQueueConfirm_other: Move {{count}} conversations to the "Other" tab? A new customer message will automatically bring them back here.
inbox.dismissFromAnalyzeQueueTitle: Remove this conversation from the To analyze queue and move it to the Other tab. A new customer message will bring it back here automatically.
inbox.identifiersRefreshFailed: Details saved. Order/tracking refresh failed — will retry on next sync.
inbox.adjustDraftPlaceholder: e.g. Be more formal, mention refund policy, shorten…
inbox.generateInputPlaceholder: Optional: tell the AI what to change (e.g. 'add the tracking link', 'be more formal'). Cmd/Ctrl+Enter to submit.
inbox.filesKept: Added files are kept for 7 days
inbox.noDraftYet: No draft yet. Click "Generate draft" above.
inbox.pillPartialHistoryTooltip: Earlier messages are missing (conversation predates the connection or outside the 60-day window). Draft based on partial history — review carefully.
inbox.noReplyNeededMsg: No reply needed — the conversation appears closed.
inbox.markNonSupportTitle: Classify this conversation as not support: it leaves "To analyse" for the "Other" tab. A new customer message classified as support brings it back automatically.
inbox.bulkConfirmWaitingCustomer: Mark {{count}} conversations as waiting on customer?
inbox.bulkConfirmWaitingMerchant: Mark {{count}} conversations as waiting on me?
inbox.bulkConfirmMarkSupport: Treat {{count}} conversations as support? They'll move to the To-analyse queue.
inbox.bulkAnalyzeWarning: {{count}} of them have never been analyzed and will be analyzed to draft a reply. This uses {{count}} analyses from your quota.
inbox.bulkToastDraftsQueued: Draft generation started for {{count}} conversations — drafts will appear as they're ready.

send.internal_banner: Sends disabled (internal store) — click anyway to test the flow

page.title: Billing & plan
page.lead: Choose the plan that fits the volume of support emails you handle.
page.subscribedSuccess: Subscription confirmed — your plan is now active.
page.subscriptionDeclined: Your subscription was not activated. You can choose a plan below and try again.

plan.advancedDashboard_one: Advanced dashboard — up to {{count}} day of history
plan.advancedDashboard_other: Advanced dashboard — up to {{count}} days of history
plan.basicDashboard_one: Basic dashboard — up to {{count}} day of history
plan.basicDashboard_other: Basic dashboard — up to {{count}} days of history

gated.heatmap: Activity heatmap is available on Pro
gated.alerts: Anomaly alerts are available on Pro
gated.reopened: Reopened conversations insight is available on Pro

trial.activeBanner_one: You have {{count}} day left in your trial. Choose a plan to continue past it.
trial.activeBanner_other: You have {{count}} days left in your trial. Choose a plan to continue past it.
trial.expiredBanner: Your trial has ended. Choose a plan to continue using Automail.

banner.warning: You've analyzed {{used}} of {{limit}} support conversations this month.
banner.critical: Almost out of quota: {{used}} of {{limit}} support conversations analyzed this month.
banner.exceeded: Quota reached ({{used}} / {{limit}}) — sync paused. Upgrade to continue.

modal.exceededTitle: Quota reached for this month ({{used}} / {{limit}} conversations)
modal.exceededBody: Upgrade to Pro to continue immediately, or wait until next month for the reset.
modal.lastUsedTitle: You've analyzed all the support conversations in your current plan
modal.lastUsedBody: {{used}} of {{limit}} conversations analyzed. Analysis is paused until next month or upgrade.

syncSuspended.banner: Full analysis and draft generation are paused — your quota is exhausted or your trial has ended. Mails are still received and classified as support / non-support; they accumulate in the "To analyze" tab until you upgrade or the monthly reset kicks in.

mailboxCounter.label: Connected mailboxes
mailboxCounter.atLimit: You have reached your plan limit.

downgrade.title: Downgrade to {{targetPlanId}}
downgrade.intro: You have {{current}} connected mailboxes, but the {{targetPlanId}} plan only allows {{limit}}. Please choose the mailbox to keep.
downgrade.warning: Unselected mailboxes will be disconnected and their data deleted.

classification.resetAllTitle: Clear all your manual edits and re-derive the analysis from scratch
classification.regenerateDraftHint: Remember to regenerate the draft to reflect the changes.

errors.candidate_mismatch: The selected order no longer exists.
errors.order_not_found: No order found for this number.
errors.order_ambiguous: Multiple orders match — please be more specific.

welcome.title: Welcome to Automail
welcome.body: Automail helps you reply faster to support emails by drafting answers grounded in your real Shopify order and tracking data.

connect.title: Connect your mailbox
connect.body: Pick your provider. Automail only reads your support emails to draft replies.

checklist.title: Getting started
checklist.toneAndSignature: Set your reply tone and signature

connections.title: Connected mailboxes
connections.subtitle: {{used}} of {{limit}} mailboxes used
connections.emptyState: No mailbox connected yet. Connect your first mailbox to start analysing support emails.
connections.firstSyncInProgress: First sync in progress… This can take a few minutes. This page refreshes automatically.
connections.disconnectWarning: This will permanently remove the mailbox and its {{threadCount}} conversations from Automail. This action cannot be undone.
connections.limitReachedBody: You have reached the maximum number of mailboxes for your current plan. Upgrade to Pro to connect more.
connections.softPauseBanner: All {{pausedCount}} of your mailboxes have been automatically paused following a plan change. Your plan now allows {{limit}} mailbox. Resume the mailboxes you want to keep active.

reauth.title: Enable sending for {{email}} ({{provider}})
reauth.intro: To send emails from Automail, we need an additional permission from {{provider}}.
reauth.bullet_no_auto: No automatic sending — you keep full control.
reauth.bullet_each_click: Every send requires your explicit click.
reauth.bullet_no_extra_read: We access no emails beyond what you already see.
